title: ScheduleRama — Run the season, not the spreadsheet
description: One command center for athletic directors, coaches, and league admins. Coordinate games, manage requests, and keep every schedule in sync.

hero.heading:
Schedule
Every
Team &
League.
hero.tagline:
ScheduleRama — Run the season,
not the spreadsheet!
hero.summary: One command center for athletic directors, coaches, and league admins. Coordinate games, manage requests, and keep every schedule in sync.

pillars.title: Faster Scheduling
pillars.body: Pre-populate entire seasons with the Group Scheduler. Auto-balance home and away. Go from blank calendar to full schedule in minutes, not weeks.

pillars.title: Clear Accountability
pillars.body: Every request, approval, and status change tracked with a full message thread. No lost emails. No "who confirmed that?" — just a clean audit trail.

pillars.title: Role-Based Control
pillars.body: Super admins govern the system. League admins see their leagues. ADs manage their schools. Coaches focus on their teams. Everyone gets exactly what they need.

featuresSection.heading:
Every Tool to
Run a Tight Season
featuresSection.summary: From game finder to group scheduler — every workflow built for the way athletic programs actually operate.

items.title: Schedule Management
items.body: Interactive calendar with sport, level, and date filters. Saved views and custom checklists keep your team on track through every phase.

items.title: Group Scheduler
items.body: Pre-populate full seasons from a preview. Automatically balance home and away. Review the entire matchup grid before committing one game.

items.title: Game Finder
items.body: Search open opponents by date, sport, and level. Send game requests directly from results. Fill gaps faster than any email chain ever could.

items.title: Requests Inbox
items.body: Centralized request workflow with message threads and approvals. Every conversation tied to a specific game. Status visible in real time.

items.title: Organization Data
items.body: Manage schools, teams, leagues, sports, and facilities from one place. Bulk team creation for league-wide setups. Contacts linked to teams.

items.title: Reports & Import
items.body: CSV export for every data set. Print-ready schedule views. Validated schedule import with field mapping — no manual re-entry.

items.title: Chat & Live Updates
items.body: Direct user-to-user messaging with presence indicators. Game requests, replies, and change notices push live — toast notifications and unread badges update without a page refresh.

items.title: Operational Workflows
items.body: Transportation plans, facility readiness, and officials confirmation — each owned by the right role. Role-specific dashboards show only what's relevant to each person.

solutionsSection.heading:
Built for Everyone
in the Athletic Stack
solutionsSection.summary: ScheduleRama adapts to how each role works — scoped access, targeted workflows, and the right level of visibility.

items.title: Athletic Director
items.body: Full school-scoped visibility and control. Manage teams, games, contacts, and facilities for every sport your school runs.
bullets: Use Game Finder to fill gaps

items.title: League Admin
items.body: League-scoped tools to structure and enforce consistency across every member school in your league.
bullets: Run Group Scheduler for the season

items.title: Coach
items.body: Team-focused view without the noise. Find opponents, coordinate games, and track your team's schedule and readiness.
bullets: Discover opponents by sport and date

items.title: Super Admin
items.body: Full-platform governance. Set permissions, manage users, oversee game lifecycles, and keep the whole system running clean.

matrixSection.heading: Who Can Do What
matrixSection.summary: Permissions designed so everyone has access to exactly what they need — and nothing they don't.

pricingSection.heading:
Plans That Scale
With Your League
pricingSection.summary: Transparent tiers for small programs to multi-school associations. No surprise overages.

plans.title: Single School
plans.description: Perfect for independent schools and small programs getting organized for the first time.

plans.title: League Plan
plans.description: Built for leagues managing multiple member schools with structured seasons and shared governance.

plans.title: Multi-League
plans.description: For athletic associations and super admins overseeing dozens of schools across multiple leagues.

items.title: User Guide
items.body: Step-by-step workflows for every role, from first login to full season setup.

items.title: Feature Matrix
items.body: Complete breakdown of every feature and which roles can access it.

items.title: Release Notes
items.body: What's new, improved, and coming next to ScheduleRama.

items.title: FAQ
items.body: Quick answers to the most common questions from ADs, coaches, and admins.
